form_description: Intake form for ARH Anyur requests. Captures customer name, the type of Anyur need (Pembiayaan/Pendanaan/Kerja Sama), legality document links, additional notes, and the supervising user.

fields.label: DOKUMEN LEGALITAS NASABAH
fields.placeholder: Diisi link Google Drive/Link PDF/Ms.W (Dokumen : Akta Pendirian & Perubahan serta SK Kemenkumham, NPWP Perusahaan, KTP Pengurus, NIB, Perizinan Perusahaan, dokumen lainnya jika ada dan diperlukan)

manual_flags: ATASAN USER is a Jira user-picker (person field) with no n8n equivalent; build as a member-snapshot dropdown and refresh as people join Plane. Maps to Plane assignees via member-email lookup.
DOKUMEN LEGALITAS NASABAH expects a Google Drive / PDF / Ms.W link (treated as text/link), not an inline file upload — Plane create API takes no inline files.
workflow_name: ARH · ANYUR REQUEST form → Plane work item
